violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Both the bar and the kitchen sanitation buckets tested well below acceptable range. -two dry cloths laying out on a cutting board and table.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -Cooked taco meat prepped and stored were date maked to 4/17 -Large tub of house made ranch was date marked 4/11. When asked the manager informed us the range was dated for when it was made and the taco meat was dated for when it should be thrown out.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Ice machine has a build up and requires cleaning.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. -Designed hand sink in bar area has been turned into a dump sink. Establishment no longer has a designated hand sink for the bar area.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --The utensil bins on the bottom shelf of below the pizza oven were not covered and had food debris inside the bins. The bottoms shelfs also indicate a high probability that the utensils are not protected from potential contamination. Cover or store in bins/totes.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. * The bottom shelves, bottom bases of cabinets and coolers have a build up of food debris and are in need of cleaning.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
